item.title: Master Salary Negotiation 💰 • Research industry standards to set a realistic range. • Use: “Based on my research, the market rate is $X–$Y.” • Highlight your unique skills and achievements. • Practice your pitch to sound assertive and clear. • Be prepared to discuss benefits, not just salary. 📈 How can you leverage your skills to justify a higher salary offer? #negotiation #careeradvice #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Master Salary Negotiation 💰 • Research industry standards to set a realistic range. • Use: “Based on my research, the market rate is $X–$Y.” • Highlight your unique skills and achievements. • Practice your pitch to sound assertive and clear. • Be prepared to discuss benefits, not just salary. 📈 How can you leverage your skills to justify a higher salary offer? #negotiation #careeradvice #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
